title: Cuba trigona
taxonomy: Cuba trigona is classified as a species within the genus Trigonia, which is part of the family Trigonaceae. The family Trigonaceae is a group of flowering plants, commonly known as the trigonias. Trigonias are native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, including Cuba. They are characterized by their distinctive fruit and unique seed structure. As part of the Trigonaceae family, Cuba trigona is a member of the group of plants that are primarily found in humid, tropical environments.
